title: Godot Data-Driven Config Field Spec
description: One spec describes one <Name>Data class. Feed to scaffold.py.

name.description: snake_case category name, e.g. 'weapon', 'enemy'. Will produce class_name <Name>Data.

display.description: Human-readable category name. Default = Title Case of `name`.

base_class.description: Rarely changed. Resource is right 99% of the time.

default_id.description: Default entry id, e.g. 'default_weapon'. Default = 'default_' + name.

items.description: Simple GDScript boolean expression referring to fields, e.g. 'bullet_speed > 0'. Evaluated per-entry in DataManager.validate().

default.description: Literal GDScript value, printed as-is. E.g. 20.0, "\"Pistol\"", "&\"\"", "Vector3.ZERO".

range.description: [min, max, step] — produces @export_range. Only for int/float.

group.description: Inspector group. Consecutive fields with same group are merged under @export_group.

doc.description: GDScript doc comment above the field.
